title: Weekly Go China Radar Issue 005
subtitle: Access foundation, reviewer evidence, and release-gated GCA utility.
scope: Issue 005 is a ready-for-review GCA content brief prepared for the 2026-06-14 public content slot. It explains public account intake, read-only wallet verification, utility credits, GCA Member review, BaseScan follow-up readiness, and release-gate boundaries. It is not live market data, not a buy or sell signal, and it makes no price, return, listing, audit, or security-vendor approval claim.

narrativeThemes.name: Public account foundation
narrativeThemes.description: GCA now has a public path for registration, access information, read-only wallet verification, and reviewer-visible status evidence.

narrativeThemes.name: Utility without custody
narrativeThemes.description: Credits, member records, and service requests are account-level workflow records, not cash, exchange custody, trading permission, or automatic token claims.

narrativeThemes.name: Reviewer evidence stays current
narrativeThemes.description: The daily status snapshot, BaseScan follow-up pack, domain email evidence, and release gates keep public reviewer material current.

riskNotes: GCA remains early-stage and the official market route has starter-depth liquidity.
BaseScan token profile publication is not complete until BaseScan publishes the public token profile.
No third-party audit has been completed.
Credits, member status, and the 10,000 GCA member benefit are not income, cash, reimbursement, or trading permission.
The member benefit is not automatic and must not be described as self-service claiming.
Public communication must not add price targets, return promises, listing promises, or artificial market activity language.
